overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in futuristic armor exploring dimly lit industrial corridors of a sci-fi facility. The character moves through maintenance rooms and locker-lined hallways with artificial warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance room with caution barrier

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial room toward the exit doorway, passing caution tape on the right

entered.detail: yellow and black striped caution tape blocking off a section of the room
industrial metal safety railing with horizontal bars
tall gray metal storage lockers against the right wall
exposed industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
doorway leading to the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit industrial maintenance room with caution tape blocking a section to the right. Metal railings line the left wall while lockers stand against the right, as the character walks forward toward an exit doorway.

events.description: character passes through doorway from maintenance room into narrow corridor lined with lockers

agents.ego_description: passing through the doorway and walking down the narrow corridor between rows of metal lockers

entered.detail: metal door frame marking the transition between the room and corridor
row of gray metal lockers on the left wall
row of gray metal lockers on the right wall
simple metal bench against the left wall
dark rubber floor mat in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor lined with metal lockers on both sides. A bench sits against the left wall as the character continues walking, leaving the caution-taped maintenance room behind through the doorway frame.

events.description: potted plant becomes visible on the right side as the corridor opens ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward an intersection, approaching an open area with a visible desk ahead

entered.detail: large potted plant with green foliage in a white container
open doorway leading to a room intersection ahead
desk or workstation visible through the distant doorway

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the corridor where a potted plant appears on the right, replacing the lockers. The corridor opens ahead into an intersection with another room visible in the distance, while the left wall still features lockers and a bench receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restricted maintenance area into a widening industrial corridor. It begins in a dimly lit maintenance room where the character walks past metal railings and caution tape toward an exit doorway. As the character passes through the frame, the scene shifts into a narrow hallway enclosed by rows of metal lockers and a solitary bench. The corridor then opens up as the lockers on the right give way to a potted plant, leading the camera toward a distant intersection and an adjacent room.
